agents.verdict: NEEDS REVISION (2 crit) — resolved in v2 addendum + AC#12 corrected

agents.owns: metrics-registry, readiness, rarity-core, tools, recap+card, progress/page

da_key_catch: 80 ceiling is a SAFETY NET — with heavy Elbert gates (0.3+0.2) untested=0 already pulls rawScore<80, cap moot; binds only when rawScore>80 (under-weighted gates). AC#12 corrected to weight-aware tests.
dev_plan: ONE developer agent, sequential REQ-001→002→004→003→005→006 (contained additive scope, zero file overlap)

research_findings.compute_readiness: spreads ...snap → new fields auto-flow; only description update needed
research_findings.write_tools: create_goal/update_goal_targets validate via GoalTargetSchema → gating auto-passes once added
research_findings.rarity_core: REIMPLEMENTS (does not call computeReadiness); current===null guard stays valid → NO change needed
research_findings.cleanup: ReadinessSnapshot.missing JSDoc says 'excluded from score' — now false, update it
research_findings.score_drops: all existing scores drop/cap on deploy — intended (honesty); coach should pre-communicate

ux_research: skipped — additive text line on existing surfaces, no new visual/interactive component

locked_design.untested: count as 0 progress, full weight in denominator (rawScore)
locked_design.gating: gating?:boolean on GoalTarget; gate cleared when progress>=1; ceiling=80 while any open, 100 when all clear; score=min(rawScore,ceiling)
locked_design.migration: none (gating is additive JSON in Goal.targets)

dev_sequencing: A (engine/schema/MCP/rarity) -> merge -> B (recap card + progress display)
